answers.value: U.S. Army Reserve mobilization for Operation Desert Shield/Desert Storm; logistics and transportation support based primarily in Dhahran and King Khalid Military City, Saudi Arabia; convoy operations into northern Saudi Arabia near Iraqi border.

answers.value: First tour: January 1968 – December 1968 (Tet Offensive period), second extended tour: February 1969 – August 1969; engaged in air assault missions, perimeter defense, and patrol operations; frequently operated out of fire support bases in the central highlands.
